name: China Sam's Chicken Wings
recipeIngredient: 1 tsp Hot & Spicy Stir Fry Seasoning, Calaphon
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the drumette from the rest of the wing.
2. Place on a broiler pan with the skin side down.
3. Season with Oriental Seasoning and Hot & Spicy Stir Fry Seasoning.
4. Place on the middle rack of a preheated oven to broil.
5. As the wings start to cook, begin making the dipping sauce by whisking together Teriyaki marinade, Oriental BBQ Sauce, Soy, and Brown sugar.
6. When the wings are golden brown on one side (about 10 minutes), remove from the oven and turn over. Season slightly and return to the oven.
7. When the wings are golden brown on the other side, remove them from the broiler pan.
8. Dip and shake off excess sauce.
9. Return the wings to the broiler pan and continue broiling for a few more minutes until they are nicely crusted.
10. Serve as an appetizer or alongside fried rice. Enjoy with a glass of plum wine.
This dish is great for sharing and can be prepared quickly in the oven, making it perfect for entertaining guests.
